verdicts.reasoning: The layered brick-and-gold tower shows sustained construction, but it does not read as a pirate ship.
verdicts.comment: Your brick tower has a strong layered shape. Try adding a wooden hull to connect it to the pirate task next.

verdicts.reasoning: The gold center and balanced brick pattern are elaborate, while ship features are absent.
verdicts.comment: Your gold detail gives the tower a bold focal point. Add a sail shape to steer the idea toward a pirate ship next.
